testcase.name: TipSection > shows success toast when Stripe payment succeeds
TipSection > shows error toast when Stripe payment fails
testcase.system-err:
[ERROR] Tip payment failed { "message": "Payment failed", "stack": "Error: Payment failed

testcase.name: TipSection > renders payment method selection when both Stripe and Venmo are available
TipSection > calls onVenmoPayment with a properly constructed URL when Venmo is used
TipSection > renders QR code fallback when no Stripe or Venmo payment methods are available
TipSection > returns to payment method selection when back button is clicked after choosing a payment method
TipSection > renders Venmo payment flow directly when only Venmo is available
withRetry circuit breaker > fails fast with DbCircuitOpenError when circuit is open
withRetry circuit breaker > exposes status and retryAfterSeconds on circuit open error
